title: Agency profile (curated context about an agency's data, not the data itself)

profiles.description: Keyed by registry slug (_meta/catalog/agencies.yml); validate_frontmatter.py rejects orphan keys and requires an entry for every agency with in-repo content

governance.description: Governance class. Anything but 'unclassified' REQUIRES governance_basis — a classification without a citation is an invented claim.

governance_basis.description: Citation supporting the classification (e.g. 'ORS 184.305 (creates DAS); ORS 174.112' or 'Or. Const. Art. VI, §1'). Prefer citations whose text is in-repo.

policies_published.description: Where/whether the agency publishes its internal policies. 'web' requires policies_location.

policies_location.description: URL or description of the listing of record for the agency's policies (or how to request them)

notes.description: Free-text context for the model: known quality caveats, publication quirks, scope notes
